sourcesContent:
export const generateTransactions = () => [
  { id: 1,  date: "2025-11-02", amount: 85000, category: "Salary",        type: "income",  description: "Monthly salary" },
  { id: 2,  date: "2025-11-03", amount: 2400,  category: "Food",          type: "expense", description: "Grocery store" },
  { id: 3,  date: "2025-11-05", amount: 1800,  category: "Transport",     type: "expense", description: "Monthly metro pass" },
  { id: 4,  date: "2025-11-07", amount: 12000, category: "Freelance",     type: "income",  description: "Web project payment" },
  { id: 5,  date: "2025-11-08", amount: 800,   category: "Entertainment", type: "expense", description: "Netflix + Spotify" },
  { id: 6,  date: "2025-11-10", amount: 5200,  category: "Shopping",      type: "expense", description: "Winter clothes" },
  { id: 7,  date: "2025-11-12", amount: 1500,  category: "Health",        type: "expense", description: "Gym membership" },
  { id: 8,  date: "2025-11-14", amount: 950,   category: "Food",          type: "expense", description: "Restaurants & dining" },
  { id: 9,  date: "2025-11-15", amount: 18000, category: "Housing",       type: "expense", description: "Monthly rent" },
  { id: 10, date: "2025-11-17", amount: 3000,  category: "Investment",    type: "income",  description: "Dividend payout" },
  { id: 11, date: "2025-11-18", amount: 600,   category: "Transport",     type: "expense", description: "Fuel" },
  { id: 12, date: "2025-11-20", amount: 2800,  category: "Food",          type: "expense", description: "Party groceries" },
  { id: 13, date: "2025-11-21", amount: 450,   category: "Entertainment", type: "expense", description: "Movie tickets" },
  { id: 14, date: "2025-11-23", amount: 85000, category: "Salary",        type: "income",  description: "Monthly salary" },
  { id: 15, date: "2025-11-25", amount: 7500,  category: "Shopping",      type: "expense", description: "Electronics" },
  { id: 16, date: "2025-12-01", amount: 85000, category: "Salary",        type: "income",  description: "Monthly salary" },
  { id: 17, date: "2025-12-03", amount: 3100,  category: "Food",          type: "expense", description: "Grocery + dining" },
  { id: 18, date: "2025-12-04", amount: 1800,  category: "Transport",     type: "expense", description: "Monthly metro pass" },
  { id: 19, date: "2025-12-06", amount: 18000, category: "Housing",       type: "expense", description: "Monthly rent" },
  { id: 20, date: "2025-12-08", amount: 8000,  category: "Freelance",     type: "income",  description: "Design project" },
  { id: 21, date: "2025-12-10", amount: 2100,  category: "Health",        type: "expense", description: "Doctor + medicines" },
  { id: 22, date: "2025-12-12", amount: 4300,  category: "Entertainment", type: "expense", description: "Concert tickets" },
  { id: 23, date: "2025-12-14", amount: 1200,  category: "Shopping",      type: "expense", description: "Books & stationery" },
  { id: 24, date: "2025-12-18", amount: 5000,  category: "Investment",    type: "income",  description: "Stock gains" },
  { id: 25, date: "2025-12-20", amount: 3500,  category: "Food",          type: "expense", description: "Holiday dining" },
  { id: 26, date: "2025-12-22", amount: 9800,  category: "Shopping",      type: "expense", description: "Holiday gifts" },
  { id: 27, date: "2025-12-28", amount: 2200,  category: "Transport",     type: "expense", description: "Holiday travel" },
  { id: 28, date: "2026-01-01", amount: 85000, category: "Salary",        type: "income",  description: "Monthly salary" },
  { id: 29, date: "2026-01-03", amount: 2600,  category: "Food",          type: "expense", description: "Grocery store" },
  { id: 30, date: "2026-01-05", amount: 1800,  category: "Transport",     type: "expense", description: "Monthly metro pass" },
  { id: 31, date: "2026-01-07", amount: 18000, category: "Housing",       type: "expense", description: "Monthly rent" },
  { id: 32, date: "2026-01-10", amount: 15000, category: "Freelance",     type: "income",  description: "App development" },
  { id: 33, date: "2026-01-12", amount: 3400,  category: "Shopping",      type: "expense", description: "New year shopping" },
  { id: 34, date: "2026-01-15", amount: 1500,  category: "Health",        type: "expense", description: "Gym membership" },
  { id: 35, date: "2026-01-18", amount: 900,   category: "Entertainment", type: "expense", description: "Streaming services" },
  { id: 36, date: "2026-01-22", amount: 4500,  category: "Investment",    type: "income",  description: "Crypto gains" },
  { id: 37, date: "2026-01-25", amount: 1800,  category: "Food",          type: "expense", description: "Weekend dining" },
];
